headline: Devon Energy completes $58bn merger with Coterra Energy
summary: The new entity will be headquartered in Houston, Texas, US, and continue to maintain a significant presence in Oklahoma City.

raw.headline: Devon Energy completes $58bn merger with Coterra Energy
raw.summary: The new entity will be headquartered in Houston, Texas, US, and continue to maintain a significant presence in Oklahoma City.

headline: Devon Launches $8 Billion Buyback After Coterra Merger
summary: Devon boosts shareholder returns following completion of its merger with Coterra Energy.

raw.headline: Devon Launches $8 Billion Buyback After Coterra Merger
raw.summary: Devon boosts shareholder returns following completion of its merger with Coterra Energy.
